economic_notes: First Nation owns 100% of Twatatya' Takenhas Inc. (TTI), a GBE that invests in on-reserve and off-reserve business ventures including a community solar microgrid through its wholly-owned subsidiary Onyota'a:Ka Kahsatst^'Sla' Ltd. TTI holds a 9.1% interest in MySmartSimulations Inc. The First Nation receives Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions (Casino Rama revenues) and holds a 1.8217% interest in Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth Limited Partnership. Community benefit agreement fund from Greenlane funding agreement. Defined contribution pension plan with $257,026 in employer contributions.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). The GBE Twatatya' Takenhas Inc. is accounted for using the modified equity method and not fully consolidated. Long Term Care Home (TSI'Nu:Yoyantle'Na'Tuhuwatisni) is fully consolidated. Revenue includes large deferred revenue movements that significantly affect reported totals. Social services segment ($7,682,957) shows as zero in prior year comparatives. Total government transfers of $42,598,359 includes ISC, Health Canada and Province of Ontario operating transfers only; OFNLP and other funders not included in Note 20 government transfers total. OSR calculated as total revenue $46,762,702 minus government transfers per income statement (ISC $17,713,230 + Health Canada $7,152,655 + Province of Ontario $17,732,474 + OFNLP $1,552,635) = $4,164,343 (includes GBE income, council operations, other funding net of repayments and deferred revenue adjustments). Annual debt service reflects repayments only; new CMHC loan of $838,000 advanced during year. No schedule of remuneration disclosed in the extracted text.
